batch: Batch148 — Hosted Proof Evidence Authenticity Lock
phase: P0 hosted proof artifact authenticity and anti-stale lock after Batch147 closure dossier
selectedBecause: Batch147 can review downloaded hosted proof artifacts, but a final closure still needs a stronger authenticity lock so stale local artifacts, mixed-run JSON files, missing screenshots, or manually copied partial evidence cannot be mistaken for real GitHub Actions Node24 hosted proof.
consistencyLocks: All available generatedAt timestamps for required JSON artifacts must fit inside maxTimestampSpreadMinutes.
Preflight, summary, hosted CI report, closure dossier, and visual evidence must not mix local dry-run evidence with hosted proof claims.
Every required JSON artifact is hashed into the lock manifest; screenshot PNG files are inventoried with sha256 and byte size.
APP_URL origin must be HTTPS and non-local wherever an origin is present.
GitHub Actions provenance must exist at least in preflight for strict hosted proof.

allowed: Batch148 adds an anti-stale authenticity lock and hash manifest for real hosted proof artifact bundles.
Local/source runs can produce a blocked authenticity report explaining stale, mixed, or missing evidence.
Strict authenticity lock can pass only with same-run Node24 GitHub Actions hosted evidence and screenshot PNG inventory.
blocked: Không nói hosted proof closed nếu authenticity lock strict chưa pass với artifact GitHub Actions thật.
Không dùng artifact local/stale/mixed-run để claim APP_URL hosted proof.
Không nói public rollout allowed nếu readiness, production DB/security/legal review chưa đủ.
